name: UBA : Anomalous Cloud Account Created From New Location
notes: Detects cloud account creation activities from a new location.
bb_references: BB:UBA : User Account Created match at least 1 times in 3 hour(s) after any of UBA : User Geography Change match with the same Username
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Cloud Endpoints
when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when BB:UBA : User Account Created match at least 1 times in 3 hour(s) after any of UBA : User Geography Change match with the same Username
thresholds: when BB:UBA : User Account Created match at least 1 times in 3 hour(s) after any of UBA : User Geography Change match with the same Username
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Anomalous Cloud Account Created From New Location on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Cloud Endpoints
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when BB:UBA : User Account Created match at least 1 times in 3 hour(s) after any of UBA : User Geography Change match with the same Username
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Anomalous Cloud Account Created From New Location
